title: 2000s-Era Xbox Games Are Coming to Windows 11: Here Are the First 4
summary: Microsoft is breathing new life into old-school Xbox games by porting them to Windows 11 and making them playable on PCs and gaming handhelds , including the Xbox Ally and Xbox Ally X .
